name: Jakub Górecki
message:
PMO Specialist with over 3 years of experience in IT and digital
transformation projects within multinational environments. Skilled in project
governance, reporting, financial tracking, and risk management. Experienced
in coordinating cross-functional teams, stakeholder communication, and
testing cycles (UAT). Adept at maintaining PMO standards and supporting
continuous improvement to enhance project delivery performance.
